intro: Ultimate Screenshot is a ready-to-run Apify actor from FlowExtract API for developer tools & utilities. Device emulation not working? This page explains what it does, who it's for, and how to get the most out of it — then includes the full technical documentation below.
useCases: pDF Documents: Professional document generation with custom margins
video Content: MP4 recordings and animated GIFs
full-Page Capture: Capture entire webpage length, not just viewport

faq.q: How do I run Ultimate Screenshot?
faq.a: Open Ultimate Screenshot on the Apify Store, provide your input (URLs or search parameters), and click Start. Results are available as JSON, CSV, or Excel, and via the Apify API.
Ultimate Screenshot runs on Apify's pay-as-you-go platform; you only pay for the compute/usage a run consumes. Check the actor page for current pricing and any free tier.
